rulings.Case Title: THE VERLIS BROWN SMITH LIVING TRUST DATED DECEMBER 22,2000
rulings.Calendar Matter: ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Demurrer By Reginald Smith To Amended Petition For Trust Accounting (Re-Set)
rulings.Rulings: The demurrer is overruled. The invalidation of the trust does not preclude petitioner from seeking relief based on respondent¿s actions while acting as trustee. Any party wishing to contest the tentative ruling and argue the motion must advise opposing parties and notify the courtroom clerk (415-551-3702) by 5:00 p.m. on Wednesday, August 22, 2012.

rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE JUDITH S. KOHLER 1994 LIVING TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: Petitioner'S Notice Of Motion And Motion For Leave To File Second Amended Petition.
rulings.Rulings: The motion for leave to file a second amended petition is granted. Petitioner is entitled to file a pleading stating the basis for his current claims. The Court does not consider the merits of the relief sought on this motion to amend. Even assuming that respondent is correct that the petitioner¿s current theory will not entitle him to any relief other than foreclosure, that issue will need to be raised at a later, appropriate time in response to the amended petition. Any party wishing to contest the tentative ruling and argue the motion must advise opposing parties and notify the courtroom clerk (415-551-3702) by 5:00 p.m. on Wednesday, August 22, 2012.
